desc: Selects elements matching a named ParameterFilterElement.
summary: Selects elements matching a named ParameterFilterElement. Resolves the filter by name, extracts categories via GetCategories() and rules via GetElementFilter(), then applies to all elements in the chosen scope. Uses SelectByFamilyNameCommand.BuildFamilyTypeBreakdown for result summary. Called by CommandExecutor when Claude invokes execute_command. Related: SelectByCategoryCommand for category-only selection, SelectByParameterCommand for deep parameter search.
usecase: Select all elements currently targeted by "Coordination - Clash" filter. Select elements matching a discipline-specific filter before export. Verify which elements a view filter affects before toggling visibility.
notfor: Creating or editing filters (manual Revit operation). Selecting by category alone (use SelectByCategoryCommand — faster). Deep parameter search across all fields (use SelectByParameterCommand).
precondition: Document must contain at least one ParameterFilterElement. Active document and view must be open.
postcondition: Selection is replaced with elements that pass the filter rule set. Returns JSON with filterName, scope, totalSearched, totalSelected, and breakdown.
logictree: check: parameters.filterName → required, fail if emptycheck: resolve ParameterFilterElement by name → fail if not found (list available)check: parameters.scope == "model" → search entire modeldefault: search current view only

config_inputs.name: filterName
config_inputs.description: Name of the ParameterFilterElement to use

preprompts: Looking for elements matching your filter rules...
Resolving filter and applying to selection...
thinkingsteps: Finding the named filter in the document...
